changes.reason: Profile-local admission probe only. charm_wall_breakaway_long remains high convexity: 7 trades, 1120.6 PnL, 240.5 PnL/exposure hour, no slow trades, and worst MAE -346.8. Lowering the higher-high hurdle from 1 to 0.5 retests the previously favorable admission-expansion mechanism without touching exits or global vetoes.

Pair the relaxed higher-high requirement with a slightly stronger higher-low requirement so the test admits continuation breakaways with better support rather than weak wall chases. This keeps the profile identity intact while avoiding broad pullback pruning.

Expand the bounded charm-wall box from 20 to 25 points to sample nearby breakaway continuations. Prior single-key max-distance testing was flat, but the historical combined geometry probe improved PnL; this run changes the mechanism by adding higher-low confirmation and no TP compression.

expected_effect: Should increase or improve charm_wall_breakaway_long participation while preserving its high PnL per exposure and convex payoff. Tradeoff is possible cannibalization or weak wall-chase entries; reject unless total net profit stays >=98% of run_029, total PnL/exposure is flat or better, slow_12h remains 0, and total worst MAE does not deteriorate beyond the leader band.
label: promote
rationale: Use one legal family: batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long. The latest squeeze compression failed and a direct squeeze reversion was rejected as duplicate, while broad pullback/1DTE/call-wall tightening has repeatedly damaged profit. Charm-wall breakaway is the cleanest profile-specific expansion candidate after squeeze: high PnL per trade, strong PnL/exposure, no slow trades, and only 7 trades. This is an admission-geometry experiment, not a take-profit compression or global filter.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long produced 1120.6 PnL from only 7 VALID_0DTE trades, 160.1 average PnL, 240.5 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 107.1, no slow >=12h trades, and better worst MAE than pullback_long and charm_pin_pullback_long. Prior geometry expansion improved one historical comparison, while exit compression and broad filters are poor fits here.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Breakaway Supported Admission Expansion
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small-sample profile; relaxing wall geometry may admit lower-quality continuation attempts or cannibalize existing high-convexity entries without improving portfolio score.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway context with price still within a bounded distance above the charm wall and ES support confirmed by higher-low structure.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: charm_wall_breakaway_long trade count or PnL increases, profile PnL/exposure remains >=225, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, slow_12h remains 0, and total worst MAE is no worse than about -527.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short sample, high-win-rate, take-profit-only regime over about 12.3 calendar days. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so the main risk is hidden MAE and capital ...
